text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I go to the training track and find...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Jooordaaaaan! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can't paint your nails on the<n>course! What are
you thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, just gimme a sec, Bamboo. I<n>literally only
have to let the top coat<n>dry and then I'm good!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let it dry ? Look! Do you evenneed to be painting your nails here tobegin with?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, it's way more motivating torun with pretty nails!
choice_data_list: Nail polish protects your nails too.
Nail polish protects your nails too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you pulling my leg?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow. You know your stuff. So<n>you've got your
nails done too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you like, a top-coat-only<n>kinda person?
Or do you use more<n>than just polish?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Uhh, what're you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Also, you know where this is going,<n>right,
Bamboo? You've totally gotta<n>do your nails too.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean "where this<n>is going"?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Kinda like Othello, you know? You flip<n>and end up a
nail-doer yourself<n>'cause you got sandwiched.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No thanks! They'll come right off the<n>second I
swing my bamboo sword!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then, like, what about decorating your<n>sword?
Same-same.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Decorate my sword?! Th-that never<n>occurred to
me!
choice_data_list: That doesn't sound like a great idea...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you're totally in on this. Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's nothing to "woo" about! No<n>way I'm
decorating it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, welp, jokes aside, nails will<n>legit make your
race pop, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
How's about a design to match your<n>signature
racewear? I've got the<n>colors here, so I can do
your nails for<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A design that matches my signature<n>racewear...
Th-that does sound like<n>it'd get me fired up...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, my nails are dry.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All righty, I'll teach you next time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you're not gonna do them for<n>me?! C'mon,
what's your deal?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Y-you being serious here?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Decorate... my bamboo sword... Make<n>it... shiny?
Blind my opponents?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's playing dirty!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Honestly, that idea never even<n>occurred to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, just quit worrying and do it!Honestly, decorating a bamboosword's such a first! It'll totally befire!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, hey! Where are you<n>taking me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Thanks for saying that. You<n>really saved
me, boss!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, but I could've played around<n>with so many
designs! It would've<n>been seriously fun.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, listen. This bamboo sword is a<n>symbol of my
soul!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's a pure and righteous blade that<n>cuts through
corruption! How could<n>you even think of
decorating my<n>precious—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, my nails are dry now. Back to<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey! I was talking to you! WAIT UP!
